rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Installation Execution

rules.rule_text:
title: Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Installation Execution
id: 75bfe6e6-cd8e-429e-91d3-03921e1d7962
status: test
description: Detects ScreenConnect program starts that establish a remote access to
  a system.
references:
- https://www.anomali.com/blog/probable-iranian-cyber-actors-static-kitten-conducting-cyberespionage-campaign-targeting-uae-and-kuwait-government-agencies
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2021-02-11
modified: 2024-02-26
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.initial-access
- attack.t1133
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - e=Access&
    - y=Guest&
    - '&p='
    - '&c='
    - '&k='
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate use by administrative staff
level: medium
